zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Fitzhugh於1428年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，她的父親William FitzHugh30歲，母親Lady Margaret Willoughby34歲。她於大約1443年與William Bowes在英國達勒姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1466年在英國英格蘭達勒姆包維斯享年38歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Fitzhugh于1428年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，她的父亲William FitzHugh30岁，母亲Lady Margaret Willoughby34岁。她于大约1443年与William Bowes在英国達勒姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1466年在英国英格兰達勒姆包維斯享年38岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzhugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Fitzhugh was born in 1428, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, William FitzHugh, was 30 and her mother, Lady Margaret Willoughby, was 34. She married William Bowes about 1443, in Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1466, in Bowes, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Fitzhugh est née en 1428, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William FitzHugh, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Willoughby, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé William Bowes environ 1443, à Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1466, à Bowes, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Fitzhugh 1428 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzHugh 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Willoughby 34. Sie hat um 1443 in Durham, England William Bowes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Bowes, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Fitzhugh è nata il nel 1428 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William FitzHugh, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Willoughby, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato William Bowes circa 1443, nel Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1466, nel Bowes, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Fitzhughが1428年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父William FitzHughは30歳，母Lady Margaret Willoughbyは34歳であった。約1443年にイギリスダルハムでWilliam Bowesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1466年にイギリスイギリスダルハムボウスで38歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムストレアトラム アンド スティイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Fitzhugh(이)가 1428년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzHugh(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Willoughby(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1443년 영국 뒤람에서 William Bowes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 보우스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Fitzhugh nasceu em 1428, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzHugh, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Willoughby, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com William Bowes aproximadamente 1443, em Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1466, em Bowes, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Fitzhugh родилась в 1428 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzHugh было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Willoughby, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bowes около 1443 г. в местности дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1466 г. в местности боуесь, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности стритлэм анд стеинтон, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Fitzhugh nació en 1428, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzHugh, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Willoughby, tenía 34 años. Se casó con William Bowes aproximadamente 1443, en Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1466, en Bowes, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra.
